format_notes.goal: Lossless relative to verbose serialized spectra, except long object names are omitted from compact records.

keys.detout: GPU detector output, useful context but not truth
keys.imgs: image-id dictionary, keyed by arr.img codes

instructions.benchmark_note: Some challenge spectra may be controls or look similar to known examples. Do not classify by target_id alone; classify from the spectral evidence.
instructions.task: Analyze the unlabeled challenge spectra and return strict JSON.
